title: Trypsin inhibitor and catalytic serine
prompt: Load bovine trypsin (3PTB) as a cartoon, then show the benzamidine inhibitor as green ball-and-stick and the catalytic Ser195 on chain A as red ball-and-stick.
notes: Domain facts: 3PTB's inhibitor is benzamidine (BEN); trypsin's catalytic triad is His57/Asp102/Ser195. Mixes a ligand selection and a residue selection in one color call.
